summary: Completed testing of new Maintenance and Announcements features. All APIs working correctly. Admin panel has new Maintenance and Annonces tabs. Frontend responsive on mobile.
passed_tests: PUT /api/admin/settings/maintenance - Requires admin auth, updates maintenance mode
GET /api/admin/announcements - Requires admin auth, returns all announcements
POST /api/admin/announcements - Requires admin auth, creates new announcement
GET /api/topics - Returns topics with proper structure
GET /api/stats - Returns public stats (users_count, topics_count, posts_count)
Admin endpoints properly protected (401 without auth)
Cookie banner displays on first visit and can be accepted/declined
Announcement banner displays at top of page
Forum page displays topics with author info
Topic detail page shows posts with author info
Admin panel loads with all tabs: Users, Catégories, Signalements, Annonces, Maintenance, Logs
Admin Maintenance tab shows toggle, title, message, and ETA fields
Admin Annonces tab shows announcements list with create/edit/delete options
Admin panel responsive on mobile viewport (390x844)
Tab icons visible on mobile without text labels
critical_code_review_comments: RoleBadge and VerificationBadge components correctly implemented - only show for users with special roles/badges
Existing posts/topics don't have author_badge field (created before feature) - this is expected, badges only set on new content creation

test_credentials.admin_session: test_admin_session_1774440250404 (created for testing, user role temporarily set to admin)

seed_data_creation: Created test announcement (ann_57f32325) for testing, attempted cleanup
context_for_next_testing_agent: Maintenance and Announcements features fully tested. Admin user lefoulonmeyer0@gmail.com has role 'streamer' with 'creator' verification badge. To test admin features, temporarily set role to 'admin' in MongoDB.
